body.title: Vault admin UI in settings panel
body.result: /settings page with login, credentials grid, inline save/delete/add; JWT in localStorage; 5 vault admin routes registered
body.intention: I intend that Akien can view and edit all vault credentials from the settings panel without touching the CLI.
body.description:
Wire the vault admin HTTP endpoints (devices/vault/admin.py) into the web server device and build the settings panel UI: login form → credential owner/key/value grid with save and cancel.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/ (route registration), web UI settings panel JS/HTML
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; auth required (X-Vault-Token); scoped access enforced server-side
**Scope boundary:** IN: settings panel shows login form; on auth → owner/key/value/allowed_devices grid; save/cancel/delete row. OUT: multi-user admin, audit log, key rotation.
**Completion criteria:** Akien can open settings panel, log in, see all vault.credentials rows decrypted, edit a value, save it, and verify the change via `cc_queue.py` or vault client smoke test. JWT session survives page refresh (token in localStorage). Logout clears session.
